name: cfml-refactor
description: Detect and refactor database queries in CFML files.

commands.title: CFML Refactor: Convert Queries In Place
CFML Refactor: Rename Query Variables to prc
CFML Refactor: Convert CFM to ColdBox Handler
CFML Refactor: Convert url/form References to rc

cfml-refactor.indexOnActivation.description: Build query index when extension activates if missing

cfml-refactor.normalizeIdentifierCase.description: Treat identifier case as insignificant during matching

cfml-refactor.stripTableAliases.description: Strip single-letter table aliases during normalization

cfml-refactor.suggestSimilarQueries.description: Surface TABLE-OVERLAP matches in addition to EXACT/STRUCTURAL

cfml-refactor.indexExclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from indexing

cfml-refactor.viewSafeFunctions.description: Additional function names that are safe in views (extends the built-in list)

cfml-refactor.viewFolderPatterns.description: Glob patterns identifying view files for workspace scans

cfml-refactor.handlerLogicPrefixes.description: Function name prefixes that suggest handler logic

cfml-refactor.servicePatterns.description: Variable name suffixes that suggest service objects

cfml-refactor.defaultDatasourcePatterns.description: Datasource attribute values matching these patterns will be omitted from queryExecute options. Exact-match strings against the literal datasource attribute text. Leave empty to always emit datasource.

cfml-refactor.safeBuiltInFunctions.description: Additional built-in CFML function names that are safe to use as a <cfqueryparam> value (extends the built-in safelist). Names match case-insensitively.

scripts.package:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run package
scripts.package:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run package
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags
